description: A perfume on a user's shelf. Written by any user about their own shelf.

perfume.description: StrongRef to the app.smellgate.perfume record this shelf item is about.

acquiredAt.description: When the user acquired this perfume. ATProto lexicons can't bound a datetime, so 'not in the future' and 'not absurdly ancient' are enforced at the write layer (see lib/server/write-guards.ts); this field stays a plain datetime for the on-network contract.

bottleSizeMl.description: Bottle size in millilitres. 1000 ml (1 L) covers every real production bottle; anything above is junk data. Matches the write-layer cap.
